mapper.sql: id, application_no, applicant_id, approver_id, application_type, attendance_record_id, makeup_active_marker, start_time, end_time, reason, status, created_at, updated_at
f.id, f.application_no, f.applicant_id, f.approver_id, f.application_type, f.attendance_record_id, f.makeup_active_marker, f.start_time, f.end_time, f.reason, f.status, f.created_at, f.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM flow_application WHERE applicant_id = #{applicantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT FROM flow_application f INNER JOIN approval_task t ON t.application_id = f.id WHERE t.approver_id = #{approverId} AND t.status = 'PENDING' AND f.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY t.activated_at, t.id
mapper.update: UPDATE flow_application SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE flow_application SET approver_id = #{approverId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS task_id, t.application_id, t.approval_level, t.approver_id, t.approver_name, t.status AS task_status, t.activated_at, t.processed_at FROM approval_task t WHERE t.application_id = #{applicationId} AND t.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY t.approval_level LIMIT 1

SELECT t.id AS task_id, t.application_id, t.approval_level, t.approver_id, t.approver_name, t.status AS task_status, t.activated_at, t.processed_at FROM approval_task t WHERE t.application_id = #{applicationId} AND t.approver_id = #{approverId} LIMIT 1

SELECT t.id AS task_id, t.application_id, t.approval_level, t.approver_id, t.approver_name, t.status AS task_status, t.activated_at, t.processed_at FROM approval_task t WHERE t.application_id = #{applicationId} AND t.approval_level > #{approvalLevel} AND t.status = 'WAITING' ORDER BY t.approval_level LIMIT 1

SELECT t.id AS task_id, t.application_id, t.approval_level, t.approver_id, t.approver_name, t.status AS task_status, r.action, r.comment, t.activated_at, t.processed_at FROM approval_task t LEFT JOIN approval_record r ON r.task_id = t.id WHERE t.application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY t.approval_level
mapper.update: UPDATE approval_task SET status = #{status}, processed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE approval_task SET status = 'PENDING', activated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'WAITING'
UPDATE approval_task SET status = 'CANCELLED', processed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND status = 'WAITING'
mapper.select: SELECT t.id AS task_id, t.application_id, f.application_no, f.applicant_id, f.application_type, t.approval_level, t.approver_id, t.approver_name, t.status AS task_status, r.action, r.comment, t.activated_at, t.processed_at FROM approval_task t INNER JOIN flow_application f ON f.id = t.application_id INNER JOIN approval_record r ON r.task_id = t.id WHERE t.approver_id = #{approverId} AND t.status IN ('APPROVED', 'REJECTED') ORDER BY t.processed_at DESC, t.id DESC
SELECT FROM flow_application ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
